name: x-article-publisher
description: Publish Markdown articles to X (Twitter) Articles editor with proper formatting. Use when user wants to publish a Markdown file/URL to X Articles, or mentions "publish to X", "post article to Twitter", "X article", or wants help with X Premium article publishing. Handles cover image upload and converts Markdown to rich text automatically.
capabilities: Parse Markdown files and extract title, images, and content
Convert Markdown to HTML for rich text paste
Copy images and HTML to system clipboard
Insert images at precise positions using block index
Compress images before uploading for better performance
author: wshuyi
securitySummary: This is a legitimate content publishing skill with two Python scripts for Markdown parsing and clipboard operations. Both scripts only access user-specified files via command-line arguments, perform no network requests, no command execution, and no sensitive data access. All 103 static findings are false positives: argparse parsers were misidentified as cryptographic algorithms, and markdown code formatting was misidentified as shell execution.
valueStatement: Converts Markdown files to rich text and publishes them to X (Twitter) Articles. Automates the workflow of parsing content, uploading images, and formatting for the X Articles editor.
limitations: Requires Playwright MCP for browser automation
Only saves as draft, never auto-publishes

useCases.title: Publish blog posts
useCases.description: Convert Markdown blog posts and publish them to X Articles with full formatting preserved

useCases.title: Share documentation
useCases.description: Publish technical documentation with code blocks and images to X Articles

useCases.title: Cross-post articles
useCases.description: Transform existing Markdown content into X Articles format for broader reach

promptTemplates.title: Basic publish
promptTemplates.prompt: Publish the Markdown file at [path_to_file] to X Articles

promptTemplates.title: With custom images
promptTemplates.prompt: Publish [markdown_file] with [image_path] as the cover image to X Articles

promptTemplates.title: Draft workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Parse [article.md] and prepare it for X Articles, then save it as a draft

promptTemplates.title: Multi-image article
promptTemplates.prompt: Publish [long_article.md] to X Articles. Make sure to insert all content images at their correct positions.

bestPractices: Always verify the draft before publishing manually
Insert images in reverse order of block_index to maintain positioning
Use image compression (--quality 85) for faster uploads
antiPatterns: Do not try to publish directly without reviewing the draft first
Do not skip the Markdown parsing step before editing
Do not insert images in ascending block_index order

faq.question: Which platforms support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code when Playwright MCP is available.

faq.question: What are the size limits for X Articles?
faq.answer: X Articles have a content length limit. Very long articles may need to be split across multiple posts.

faq.question: How does it integrate with the browser?
faq.answer: It uses Playwright MCP tools for navigation, clicks, file uploads, and keyboard shortcuts.

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill only accesses files you explicitly specify and never sends data to external servers.

faq.question: Why is my image upload failing?
faq.answer: Ensure the image path is correct and the file exists. Use absolute paths for best results.

faq.question: How is this different from manual publishing?
faq.answer: Automates Markdown parsing, image positioning, and clipboard operations for faster publishing.
